_comment: VANILLA Claude Code settings for UA demo workspaces. Intentionally empty of env overrides, hooks, plugins, and experimental flags so the demo's `claude` inherits the daemon's routing env unmodified. As of 2026-06-07 that env routes to the ZAI proxy (Anthropic now API-bills the Max SDK path), so demos run on ZAI/GLM. Do NOT add an `env` block here — routing is controlled by the inherited process env (run_in_workspace, scrub_env=False), not this file; an env block would also trip verify_vanilla_settings. See docs/proactive_signals/claudedevs_intel_v2_design.md §8.
